body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-35348", "cvss": {"score": 5.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-248", "name": "Uncaught Exception"}], "description": "The sort utility in uutils coreutils is vulnerable to a process panic when using the --files0-from option with inputs containing non-UTF-8 filenames. The implementation enforces UTF-8 encoding and utilizes expect(), causing an immediate crash when encountering valid but non-UTF-8 paths. This diverges from GNU sort, which treats filenames as raw bytes. A local attacker can exploit this to crash the utility and disrupt automated pipelines.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00134, "percentile": 0.03211}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-f2jv-wjjc-2c94", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-29T23:02:15Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f2jv-wjjc-2c94", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-f2jv-wjjc-2c94"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-35348"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-22T17:16:37Z", "published_at": "2026-04-22T18:31:45Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-35348", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/issues/9696", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f2jv-wjjc-2c94"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils", "summary": "uutils coreutils has an Uncaught Exception When Encountering Valid but Non-UTF-8 Paths", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-29T23:02:15Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-f2jv-wjjc-2c94", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "coreutils"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.8.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
